utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these items. Each of the first three (health, property, travel) include detailed coverage descriptions and specific costs. 'additional_services' is present and mentions how enhancements are integrated into the health coverage cost, which fulfills the requirement of specifying any enhancement services with cost context. 'total_budget' includes both monthly and annual cost breakdowns. Therefore, all 5 items are present and fully specified according to the required format.
